CONTENT.Professional career: Zbinden is a youth academy of Plaffeien, Fribourg, and Young Boys, before moving to the reserves of Young Boys in 2020. He made his professional debut with Young Boys in a 1–1 Swiss Super League tie with Basel on 15 December 2021.
CONTENT.International career: Born in Switzerland, Zbinden is of Brazilian descent. He is a youth international for Switzerland, having represented the Switzerland U15s in 2016.

SUMMARY: Leandro José Zbinden (born 30 July 2002) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Étoile Carouge.
